steps.title: Use the variety clue
steps.content: The sentence lists different kinds of Chicago art, from sculptures to street murals, and says the city offers an array of works for art lovers. The blank should mean that this variety satisfies many different tastes.

steps.title: Choose the satisfying verb
steps.content: Choice A means replace, Choice B means reduce, and Choice C means honor. None fits the idea that diverse artworks meet art lovers' preferences. The verb meaning fully satisfy matches the sentence's point about variety. The answer is D.
